### upcoming examples: assertion failure

*  will show examples where we try to figure out how to reach function `INTERESTING`

*  aren't limited to that --- but common security use is similar
   *  checking if memory address can be out-of-bounds
   *  checking if stack canary can be overwritten
   *  checking if return address/function pointer can be set to be arbitrary value
   *  ...


### example 1  {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width=300px}

```c
void foo(int a, int b) {
  /* (0) */
  if (a != 0) {
    b -= 2;
    a += b;
  }
  /* (1) */
  if (b < 5) {
    b += 4;
  }
  /* (2) */
  if (a + b == 5)
    INTERESTING();
}
```

* every variable represented as an <em>equation</em>
* final step: generate solution for each path 
   * 100% test coverage

::::

:::: {.column width=650px}

::: {.r-stack}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-1.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-2.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-3.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-4.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-5.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-6.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-7.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=7}

![](/symbolic/texfig/choosePath1.figure-8.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=8}

:::
 
::::

:::::

 [Adapted from Hicks, ‘‘Symbolic Execution for Finding Bugs’’]{.mycredit}

### example 1 in angr  {.smaller}


```
p = angr.Project("./example1", load_options={'auto_load_libs': False})

foo_addr = p.loader.main_object.get_symbol('foo').rebased_addr
INTERESTING_addr = p.loader.main_object.get_symbol('INTERESTING').rebased_addr
input_a = claripy.BVS('initial_a', 32)
input_b = claripy.BVS('initial_b', 32)
init_state = p.factory.call_state(foo_addr, input_a, input_b)

simgr = p.factory.simulation_manager(init_state)
print("at beginning:", simgr)
simgr.explore(find=INTERESTING_addr)
print("after explore:", simgr)
for state in simgr.found:
    found_a = state.solver.eval(input_a)
    found_b = state.solver.eval(input_b)
    print(f'(a, b) = ({found_a}, {found_b})')

```
 <hr />
 
```
after explore: <SimulationManager with 4 deadended, 4 found>                                             
(a, b) = (0, 1)                                                                                          
(a, b) = (0, 5)                                                                                          
(a, b) = (1, 2)                                                                                          
(a, b) = (9, 2147483648)   

```
